mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `order` (order_no, user_id, session_id, total_amount, status, pay_time, expire_time, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{sessionId}, #{totalAmount}, #{status}, #{payTime}, #{expireTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE `order` SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 0
